---
title: Laboratory Course in Drosophila Genetics
format:
  html:
    toc: true
html-math-method:
  method: mathjax
  url: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js"
number-sections: true
---

# Introduction

{{< include _Introduction.qmd >}}

# Genetic Terminology

{{< include _GeneticTerminology.qmd >}}

# The Biology of *Drosophila melanogaster*

{{< include _BiologyDrosophila.qmd >}}

# Fly Culture

{{< include _FlyCulture.qmd >}}

# Overview of the experiments

{{< include _Experiments.qmd >}}

# Variation in Population with Natural Selection

{{< include _Selection.qmd >}}

# Dihybrid Cross with Independent Assortment

{{< include _DihybridCross.qmd >}}

# Recombination

{{< include _Recombination.qmd >}}

# Mating Behavior

{{< include _Mating.qmd >}}

# P-M Hybrid Dysgenesis

{{< include _HD.qmd >}}
